text:
Master Beneficiary Summary File significantly undercounts 
dual-eligibles from these territories currently. Users should consider this variable to be incomplete 
when constructing an analysis population that includes dual-eligibles from these two territories. 

Dual eligibles are often divided into “full duals” and “partial duals” based on the level of Medicaid 
benefits they receive. CMS generally considers beneficiaries to be full duals if they have values of 02, 
04, or 08, and to be partial
